markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Product deep dive into Otto, an AI-powered travel booking assistant for business travelers.](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Otto is a conversational AI travel assistant accessible via multiple platforms (web, mobile, email, Slack, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Offers hyper-personalized travel recommendations and bookings based on user preferences and company policies](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Simplifies the booking process with natural language interactions and efficient servicing capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Currently focuses on flights and hotels for individual business travelers, with plans to expand features](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)

## Topics

### Otto's Core Functionality

  - [Acts as an AI-powered executive assistant for travel booking](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [Accessible through multiple channels (web, mobile, email, Slack, SMS, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Learns user preferences over time for hyper-personalized recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [Simplifies booking process with conversational interface and natural language understanding](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Handles complex multi-city trip planning and itinerary management](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)

### User Experience and Interface

  - [Web interface demonstrated, similar to mobile app experience](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Users can interact via text or voice input (voice output coming soon)](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [No rigid booking flow; users can navigate freely between steps](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1018.0)
  - [Visual elements (e.g., airline logos) enhance the experience when available](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Saves trip progress, allowing users to resume booking later](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)

### Key Features

  - [Integrates company travel policies, highlighting in-policy vs. out-of-policy options](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)
  - [Provides detailed flight and hotel recommendations with explanations](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)
  - [Handles mid-trip changes and servicing requests conversationally](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)
  - [Offers efficient rebooking and cancellation capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)
  - [Generates travel receipts formatted for easy expense management import](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)

### Technical Capabilities

  - [Uses AI to understand complex travel requests and preferences](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Connects to multiple travel inventory sources for comprehensive options](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Implements voice recognition (likely using Whisper API) for speech input](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [Plans to add voice output capabilities in the future](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1559.0)

### Current Limitations

  - [Focused on individual business travelers (no multi-traveler bookings yet)](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Limited to flights and hotels (no car rentals, cruises, or restaurants currently)](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [No built-in expense management (but provides formatted receipts)](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)
  - [Lacks approval routing for out-of-policy bookings](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
  - [Does not offer flexible date/destination searches for leisure travel](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Few direct AI-powered travel booking competitors currently operational](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2724.0)
  - [Main competition from traditional corporate travel management companies (e.g., Amex GBT, Concur)](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2070.0)
  - [Some startups (e.g., Biztrip.ai, Skylink) in early stages or pivoting](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2810.0)
  - [Legacy players likely developing AI solutions but facing challenges with existing systems](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2798.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX team to receive beta access codes for hands-on testing of Otto](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=3713.0)
  - [Explore potential collaboration with DeepGram for voice AI integration](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2609.0)
  - [Continue research into target personas and market opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Monitor competitive landscape, especially legacy players' AI initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/9UgTdHNqQTJ-8qkiDDXy7ss2QXUUDe-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2931.0)
